home.hero_tagline: Browse the menu, discover daily specials, and order online — fast.

reserve.select_location_hint: Choose a location from the dropdown in the header to book a table at that restaurant.
reserve.menu_load_failed: We could not load the menu for that location. Try again or pick another location.
reserve.menu_location_invalid: That location is not available for booking.
reserve.pick_table_for_calendar: Select a table to load the calendar and booked slots.
reserve.occupied_load_failed: Could not load existing bookings for this table.
reserve.end_after_start: End time must be after start time.
reserve.slot_not_available: This time overlaps an existing booking. Pick another slot.
reserve.booked_windows_truncated: Showing the first eight; more exist in the loaded range.

menu.title: Menu
menu.empty: No dishes in this menu yet.
menu.fetch_error: We could not load the menu. Please try again later.

platform_settings.title: Platform settings
platform_settings.intro: Set the global food VAT rate and the currency used across the menu and admin price labels. Customer menu prices include VAT unless a product is marked VAT-exclusive.
platform_settings.vat_hint: Applied to customer-facing menu prices. Enter 0 until you configure tax.
platform_settings.currency_hint: ISO code used for price display (symbol from locale).
